title: MTR Foods Capital India is Hiring: Floor Manager (Senior)

jsonLd.title: MTR Foods Capital India is Hiring: Floor Manager (Senior)
jsonLd.description:
If you're a passionate Floor Manager with drive and ambition, MTR Foods Capital India in Jaipur is the place for you. We're growing fast and need talented people to grow with us.

About MTR Foods Capital India:
MTR Foods Capital India is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Prepare daily sales reports and share insights with management
• Ensure compliance with company policies and retail regulations
• Conduct regular stock audits and prevent pilferage
• Manage store operations to ensure smooth daily functioning
• Achieve sales targets and improve store performance metrics
• Ensure visual merchandising standards are maintained at all times
• Handle customer queries, complaints, and escalations effectively

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Any graduate with relevant experience
• 10-15 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Inventory Management
• Proficiency in Category Management
• Proficiency in Sales Techniques
• Proficiency in Retail Operations
• Proficiency in Supply Chain
• Proficiency in Customer Service
• Proficiency in Omnichannel Retail
• Proficiency in Shrinkage Control

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Professional development and training programs
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Salary Range: 20 LPA - 40 LPA per annum

Location: Jaipur, Rajasthan, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with MTR Foods Capital India!
